settings.heading: What are Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs are athletic scrubs and active workwear built for male nurses, LPNs, RNs, medical assistants, and other healthcare professionals who work long shifts in hospital and clinical settings. Achieve is built around one idea: scrubs that move with you, not against you. That means Comfort Pro™ — Cherokee's exclusive double-brushed performance knit — delivering the comfort of your favorite sweats with the durability your shift actually demands. The men's line covers a tuck-in chest pocket V-neck top, a 3-pocket relaxed V-neck top, pull-on jogger pants, straight leg pants, and a zip-up warm-up jacket. Clean lines, no-bulk construction, and a relaxed fit that stays sharp on the floor.

settings.heading: What fabric is Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs made from?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs are made with Comfort Pro™ — Cherokee's exclusive performance fabric built for Achieve. It's a double-brushed jersey-style knit with a plush texture inside and out. The fabric offers 360° stretch that moves with you in every direction, plus moisture wicking to pull sweat away during high-activity shifts, and breathability that keeps you from overheating when the floor gets busy. Comfort Pro™ is ultra-durable and easy care — machine washable with no special handling. The fabric also includes 40% recycled polyester content.

settings.heading: How do Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs fit?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs are cut in relaxed, athletic-inspired fits — designed to move freely without excess fabric pulling or bunching during patient care. The jogger pant has a pull-on elastic waistband with a shoelace-style drawstring for a secure, adjustable fit. The straight leg pant sits clean and structured without being restrictive. The relaxed V-neck top has a traditional, comfortable fit through the chest and shoulders. The tuck-in top is cut shorter and fitted at the waist to stay neatly tucked through a full shift. Cherokee Achieve runs true to size. For a roomier fit through the chest or thighs, size up.

settings.heading: What pockets and functional features do Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs have?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's styles are built with the functional features that matter most on the floor. The 3-Pocket Relaxed V-Neck Top has 3 pockets — enough room for your phone, pen, and the tools you reach for throughout a shift. The Tuck-In V-Neck Top includes a chest pocket for quick-access storage. For pants, both the 5-Pocket Pull-On Jogger Scrub Pant and the 5-Pocket Straight Leg Scrub Pant offer 5 pockets, including streamlined, non-bulky cargo pockets designed to carry without adding bulk. A dedicated badge loop on the pants keeps your ID secure and out of the way. Hidden pockets on select styles add extra storage while maintaining clean lines.

settings.heading: Who are Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs designed for?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs are built for male nurses, LPNs, RNs, CNAs, medical assistants, surgical techs, and other healthcare professionals who need dependable athletic scrubs and active workwear through long hospital and clinic shifts. The athletic aesthetic is intentional — these men’s scrubs are designed for professionals who are constantly moving, bending, lifting, and sprinting to a patient room, not standing still. If you need scrubs that perform through 12 hours of constant movement without restricting your range of motion or looking worn by hour six, and that still feel good enough to wear before and after the shift, Achieve is that.

settings.heading: How do I wash and care for Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Achieve men's scrubs are built for everyday, no-fuss care. Machine wash cold or warm with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach. The Comfort Pro™ fabric holds its stretch, softness, and color through repeated laundering — these are scrubs designed to look like new after a year of weekly washes, not to be treated carefully. For best results, turn inside out before washing to preserve surface texture and color. No dry cleaning or special handling needed.
